name: Narrow Side Chamber
description: A cramped chamber opens to the east, its low ceiling forcing you to stoop. The walls glisten with moisture, and the air here feels still and heavy, as if undisturbed for a long time.
ambient: Droplets cling to the ceiling before falling in slow, irregular intervals.
The silence here feels thicker than in the tunnel outside.
A faint mineral tang lingers in the air.

interaction_rules.text: You scan the uneven ground. Among the damp stones, something small catches your eye before slipping back into shadow.
The walls are slick and cold. Your fingers trace shallow grooves, as if something has scraped along them repeatedly.
